entities.name: YERSINIA ENTEROCOLITICA BIOVAR 1A
entities.description: A specific biovar of the bacterium Yersinia enterocolitica used to study genetic relationships among strains.

entities.name: MLVA
entities.description: Multilocus variable number tandem repeat analysis used for typing strains and discerning genetic relationships.

entities.name: VNTR
entities.description: Variable number tandem repeat loci used as markers for MLVA typing.

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of analyzing the entire genome sequence of Y. enterocolitica 8081 to identify VNTR loci.

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to group Y. enterocolitica biovar 1A into major groups based on MLVA genotypes.

entities.name: POPULATION MODELLING
entities.description: A method used to analyze the distribution and relationship of strains.

entities.name: MINIMUM SPANNING TREE
entities.description: A specific population modelling tool used to cluster Y. enterocolitica biovar 1A.

entities.name: GENETIC RELATIONSHIPS
entities.description: The ancestral and evolutionary connections between different strains of an organism.

entities.name: CLONAL RELATIONSHIP
entities.description: The relationship between strains derived from a single ancestor.

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC RELATIONSHIPS
entities.description: The evolutionary history and relationships among individuals or groups of organisms.

entities.name: GENOTYPING METHODS
entities.description: General techniques used to determine the genetic makeup of an organism.

entities.name: EPIDEMIOLOGICAL TOOL
entities.description: A tool used to study the patterns, causes, and effects of health and disease conditions in defined populations.
